meta.title: Whisky Tasting in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Explore whisky at a guided tasting in Calgary. Sample Scotch, bourbon, Canadian, and more. Learn what to look for and how to talk about what you're drinking.

content.subtitle: Nose, taste, and understand whisky with a guide who actually knows it.
content.intro: Whisky tasting events in Calgary bring together curious drinkers who want to understand what's actually in their glass. A knowledgeable host walks you through a selection of whiskies from different regions and styles, explaining the production process and flavour profiles in plain language. You'll leave with a real vocabulary for whisky that makes every future pour more enjoyable.

what_to_expect.heading: A flight of curated whiskies
what_to_expect.body: You'll typically taste 4 to 6 expressions chosen to show range across styles, regions, or age statements.

what_to_expect.heading: Nosing before tasting
what_to_expect.body: The host will teach you how to nose whisky properly before drinking. You'll be surprised how much you pick up before taking a sip.

what_to_expect.heading: Context and storytelling
what_to_expect.body: Production methods, distillery history, and regional character all come into the conversation. It's genuinely interesting.

what_to_expect.heading: Water and palate cleansers
what_to_expect.body: You'll have water on hand for cleansing your palate and for adding a few drops to the whisky if needed.

tips: Add just a few drops of water to cask strength whisky. It opens up the nose and softens the heat significantly.
Don't inhale too deeply right from the glass. Nose from a slight distance first, then move closer.
Canadian whisky is often underrated at tastings. Calgary is a great place to explore homegrown expressions alongside imported bottles.
Eat something before a whisky tasting. The flavours come through more clearly on a settled stomach.
Mixler lists whisky tasting events in Calgary when they're added. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know when one is coming up.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run whisky tasting events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need to be a whisky drinker to enjoy this?
faq.a: You don't need prior experience. If you're curious about whisky, a tasting is one of the best ways to start exploring it.

faq.q: What styles of whisky will I taste?
faq.a: It depends on the event theme. Some focus on Scotch, others on bourbon, or a mix. Check the event listing for specifics.
Many events include small bites or palate cleansers. Check the event listing for what's provided.

faq.q: How much whisky will I actually drink?
faq.a: Tasting portions are small, typically 15 to 20ml per pour. You're tasting and learning, not drinking full measures.
